name: Michigan First Credit Union
description_short: Michigan First Credit Union is a nearly 100-year-old credit union offering personal and business banking, loans, mortgages, and insurance with a 365-day live local call center.
description_long:
Michigan First Credit Union was founded in 1926 and has operated as a community-focused financial institution for nearly a century. Based on their website, they serve both personal and business members throughout Michigan with a strong emphasis on local service and personalized attention. The credit union operates as a member-owned cooperative, distinguishing it from traditional banks.

Michigan First offers a comprehensive suite of financial products including checking and savings accounts, personal loans, auto loans, mortgages, business accounts and business loans, credit cards, insurance products, and emergency lending through their "Minute Money" program. They also provide financial counseling services called "Financial Exploration" and support homebuying through seminars and dedicated mortgage services. Their online banking platform enables account opening in three steps, and they maintain physical branch locations across Michigan.

Key differentiators include their 365-day live local call center (staffed any day of the year), access to nearly 30,000 fee-free ATMs nationwide through credit union networks, a referral program offering $100 bonuses, and specialized programs like emergency loans approved in 60 seconds or less. They emphasize community involvement through their "First for Good" initiative dating to 1926 and host events like annual Shred Days and homebuying seminars.

While Michigan First presents as a comprehensive financial institution, the website content is primarily marketing-focused and lacks specific detail on rates, fees, loan terms, and membership eligibility requirements. Their 100-year history and local presence suggest stability, but prospective members would need to visit branches or call for concrete product specifications and comparisons.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: 365-day live local call center available any day of the year for personalized service
Access to nearly 30,000 fee-free ATMs nationwide through credit union networks
Emergency "Minute Money" loans approved in 60 seconds or less for unexpected expenses
Referral program offering $100 bonuses for both referrer and new member
Nearly 100-year history (founded 1926) suggesting institutional stability and community roots
One-on-one financial counseling through "Financial Exploration" program with finance experts
Online account opening completed in just 3 simple steps
cons: Website provides no specific information on interest rates, APRs, or fee schedules for comparison
Loan terms, approval requirements, and membership eligibility criteria not disclosed on primary website content
Limited detail on business loan products, maximum amounts, or specific terms available
No transparency on credit score requirements or lending standards for different loan products
Physical branch locations not fully listed in provided website content, limiting accessibility assessment
best_for: Michigan residents seeking personalized, local banking with century-old institutional stability
Small business owners needing comprehensive business accounts, loans, and financial services
Homebuyers in Michigan seeking mortgage lending with dedicated loan officer support and seminars
Consumers wanting emergency cash access with rapid approval (60 seconds or less)
diagnosis: Michigan First Credit Union is best for Michigan-based consumers and small business owners seeking comprehensive banking services with local, personalized service and a community-oriented approach. The main caveat is that the website lacks specific rate, fee, and term information necessary to compare offerings with competitors—prospective members must contact the credit union directly or visit branches for detailed product specifications and qualification requirements.
services: Personal loans for consolidation and purchases
Mortgages for home purchase and refinance
Credit cards and balance transfer products
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
